message:
fix: blueprint project icons + move stats to bottom of cluster zone (#5365)

Two Flight Plan Blueprint fixes:

1. Replace foreignObject GitHub avatar images with colored letter
   initials rendered as SVG <text>. The foreignObject + external
   img approach failed cross-origin in many browsers, leaving blank
   circles. Letter initials (P, G, F, K, C) are reliable and
   color-coded by CNCF category.

2. Move DISK/PVC/CPU/MEM/GPU/TPU stat blocks from top-right to
   bottom of each cluster zone, eliminating the overlap with the
   cluster name. Full cluster names now display without truncation.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
